title: PayPal, Mastercard, Citi and Others Join New Economic Opportunity Coalition
text: PayPal has joined the White House's new Economic Opportunity Coalition (EOC) to address economic disparities and move things forward for various underserved communities, the company said in a press release Thursday (July 28). The coalition will include 21 corporations and three foundations, working on aligning major investments for communities of color.

title: Capital One (COF) Down 5.2% as Q2 Earnings Lag, Provisions Rise
text: Higher provisions and an increase in operating expenses adversely impact Capital One's (COF) Q2 earnings, while a rise in revenues and higher loan balance offer some support.

title: Capital One (COF) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: Capital One (COF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.31% and 0.59%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) CEO Richard Fairbank on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF.PK ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Danielle Dietz - Managing Vice President, Global Finance Andrew Young - Chief Financial Officer Richard Fairbank - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Ryan Nash - Goldman Sachs Kevin Barker - Piper Sandler Bill Carcache - Wolfe Research Rick Shane - JPMorgan Sanjay Sakhrani - KBW Don Fandetti - Wells Fargo Moshe Orenbuch - Credit Suisse Arren Cyganovich - Citi Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Dominick Gabriele - Oppenheimer Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Capital One Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All lines have been placed on mute to prevent any background noise.

title: Why is Earnings Beat Less Likely for Capital One (COF) in Q2?
text: Supported by loan growth and higher interest rates, Capital One's (COF) interest income is expected to have increased in the second quarter of 2022.

title: Trouble Ahead in the Finance Sector?
text: Three stocks residing in the sector - Discover Financial Services (DFS), American Express (AXP), and Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) - are all slated to release quarterly results this week.

title: These 7 beaten-down value stocks are a buy, says a money manager who has outperformed the S&P 500 for 30 years
text: If you consider yourself to be a contrarian long-term investor, keeping things simple might be the best bet in this bear market for stocks.

title: Melio, Capital One Launch Accounts Payable Tool
text: B2B payments platform Melio has joined forces with Capital One Business to launch an accounts payable solution.

title: Can Capital One (COF) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Capital One (COF) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Where Is Capital One Stock Headed?
text: Capital One's stock has lost approximately 27% YTD, as compared to the 20% drop in the S&P500 over the same period. Notably, the stock market has witnessed selling pressure over the recent months due to record-high inflation figures, aggressive interest rate hikes, and the Russia-Ukraine crisis.
